title: brain sync status — --json success output
description: Read-only view of the adopted vault's sync cursor: last absorbed OID, behind-by count, pending-quarantine set, live-derived divergence state (OQ#5), and the live-derived deterministic exit-3 block. Everything beyond the sync_cursors row is derived at read time — no new column, idempotent. behindBy is null whenever divergence.state != "ok" (the count is undefined across a divergence). Never throws for a missing-but-seeded row and never reports a null lastSyncedAt (the row is seeded at adoption).

upstreamRef.description: The row's upstream_ref — the sole upstream authority (refs/heads/main in the live-vault default case; never hardcoded).

lastAbsorbedOid.description: 40-hex OID last fully processed; null before the first cycle (seed-row zero-state).

upstreamHead.description: Current 40-hex OID of the row's upstream_ref.

behindBy.description: Count of upstream commits between lastAbsorbedOid and upstreamHead; the full commit count to the empty-tree base at zero-state. null whenever divergence.state != "ok" (undefined across a divergence).

lastSyncedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC; never null — the adoption seed timestamp before the first cycle, then each cycle's finalize time.

cycleSeq.description: Monotonic cycle counter; 0 at the seed-row zero-state.

pendingQuarantine.description: The durable pending-quarantine set (keyed by path, reconciled every finalized cycle); [] at zero-state.

firstSeenOid.description: 40-hex OID where the dirty bytes first appeared.

divergence.description: Live-derived OQ#5 divergence state (no persisted column). "ok" at zero-state (a null cursor is NOT divergence).

cursorOid.description: The stuck cursor OID; null at zero-state / when ok with a null cursor.

upstreamHead.description: Current OID of the row's upstream_ref (the single upstream authority).

blocked.description: Live-derived deterministic exit-3 halt: the first commit in cursor..upstreamHead whose changed paths yield a non-attributable GeneratedArtifactGuard verdict, re-derived because the cursor never advances on exit 3. null when no deterministic block exists.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Read-only sync-cursor status: cursor, behind-by (null when diverged), pending quarantine, live-derived OQ#5 divergence and deterministic-block state.
prohibitedEffects: no cursor/pending mutation, no run, no ledger row, no audit event
never resolves divergence — reporting only (recovery is sync reset)

errorCodes.when: the vault repo is missing/unreadable, the sync_cursors row is absent, or the row's upstream_ref does not resolve
the SQLite store file is missing or unopenable
